face.structure: oval with a softly defined jawline, slightly prominent cheekbones

eyes.expression_effect: intensely focused gaze that conveys deep thought

skin.rendering_notes: subtle gradient shading to create depth around the cheeks and nose

hair.flow: waves falling casually to one side, with a slight sheen
details: strands catch light in a natural, non-uniform manner
slightly tousled giving a carefree, stylish appearance

character.aura: a subdued yet undeniable brilliance, commanding presence without dominating the space

outfit.design: sleek tailored suit with a modern cut
outfit.fit: tailored close to the body, emphasizing a lean silhouette

composition.framing: medium close-up highlighting upper body and face
composition.pose: standing in a confident, relaxed posture with one hand in pocket
composition.gesture: other hand holding a notebook with a gently scribbled page exposed

background.color_palette: muted blues and purples with hints of orange
background.details: dim city skyline and a few scattered stars becoming visible in the sky
background.rules: ensure background is slightly out of focus to maintain emphasis on character
